patch.value:
Bug class #1 (option-key normalization). The runtime normalizes --dry-run to camelCase dryRun, but both the `csv import` command handler and the `csv-import` importer read ctx.options["dry-run"], which is always undefined.

Repro:
  pm csv import export.csv --dry-run
Observed: actually imported 5 items (before=5 after=10), output "Imported 5 item(s)". Exit 0.
Expected: write nothing, print "[dry-run] Would import...".

Fix: added readBoolOption(options, "dry-run", "dryRun") helper and used it. Verified: before=3 after=3, prints dry-run preview.

author: codex

patch.value: Fixed via readBoolOption helper reading both dry-run and dryRun. Verified dry-run writes nothing (before=3 after=3).

message: Fixed via readBoolOption helper reading both dry-run and dryRun. Verified dry-run writes nothing (before=3 after=3).
